meaning: n.善于讨好女人的男子,举止优雅的人
examples: He ordered waffles and a fruit smoothie from a waiter.
Do you have a favorite smoothie recipe? Please share in the comments!
I get to eat a wonderful raw breakfast smoothie and I can make the most delicious lunch which is both good for me and saves money.
What he loves most is brainstorming new ideas--like "smoothie snacks" (whey puffs coated in orange, coconut and pineapple).
PepsiCo already sells a refrigerated smoothie under its Naked Juice line, as does Coke under its Odwalla line.
